# UNSIGNED COMMUNITY BUILD - Streamlink Twitch GUI <%= version %>

<%= changelog %>

## Packages

- Windows x64 NSIS installer (`.exe`)
- Windows x64 MSI installer (`.msi`)
- Linux x64 AppImage
- Linux amd64 Debian package (`.deb`)
- macOS x64 DMG
- macOS arm64 DMG

These packages have no platform publisher trust. Windows SmartScreen may show
an unknown publisher, and the macOS DMGs are not signed or notarized by Apple.
No automatic updater metadata is provided. Manual installation testing is
required before publication. Checksums and the SBOM are integrity evidence,
not proof that unsigned packages are secure.

Streamlink must be installed separately. See the [project README](https://github.com/Serph91P/streamlink-twitch-gui#readme) for current requirements and instructions.
